sigma.title: HTTP Request With Empty User Agent

osquery.name: t1205_proc_hidden
osquery.query_text: SELECT pid, name, path, cmdline, on_disk, cwd FROM processes WHERE on_disk = 0 OR path = '' ORDER BY start_time DESC LIMIT 100;

osquery.name: t1205_file_mod
osquery.query_text: SELECT path, filename, size, uid, gid, mode, mtime, atime FROM file WHERE (path LIKE '/tmp/%' OR path LIKE '/dev/shm/%' OR path LIKE '/var/tmp/%') AND mtime > (strftime('%s','now') - 3600) LIMIT 100;

osquery.name: t1205_crontab
osquery.query_text: SELECT event, minute, hour, day_of_month, month, day_of_week, command, path FROM crontab;

sigma_matches.title: HTTP Request With Empty User Agent

executions.reason: Live SOAR response execution for MITRE S5 linkage evidence
Live SOAR response execution for MITRE S5 linkage evidence
Live SOAR response execution for MITRE S5 linkage evidence
Materialized real SOAR execution for persisted MITRE evidence
Materialized real SOAR execution for persisted MITRE evidence

story.narrative: Execution, telemetry, detections, artifacts, network observations, and SOAR response are tracked as separate witnesses and tied together through shared anchors.

promotion.reason: Full S5 validation (Linux Docker sandbox): 11 direct run(s), 1/1 Sigma rules matched with event linkage, 0 osquery correlations confirmed, raw telemetry preserved, analyst reviewed, clean baseline.
promotion.sigma_firing_note: No real Sigma firing recorded in sigma_evaluation_report.json. Cert tier downgraded from direct (-D) to heuristic (-H). Sigma rules mapped but not triggered against live osquery events.

integrity.hash_method: SHA-256 of canonical JSON (sort_keys=True, default=str) excluding the integrity block itself
